title: poa bolanderi
intro: Poa bolanderi, also known as Bolander's bluegrass, is a species of grass native to the western United States and southwestern Canada. It has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Poa bolanderi include reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and providing relief from respiratory problems such as coughs and colds. The plant can be prepared for medicinal use through various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures.
